title: ononis tridentata var. erecta
intro: Ononis tridentata var. erecta, also known as the upright spiny restharrow, is a perennial herb belonging to the Fabaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Ononis tridentata var. erecta include treating digestive issues, reducing inflammation, and alleviating symptoms of menopausal disorders. Herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be used to address various health concerns and promote overall well-being.
